Found two differences

spec.template.spec.containers.migrate.image (document 0)
  ± value change
    - myapp:v1.0
    + myapp:v2.0

(root level) (document 1)
  + one document added:
    ---
    apiVersion: batch/v1
    kind: Job
    metadata:
      generateName: cleanup-
      namespace: default
    spec:
      template:
        spec:
          containers:
            - name: cleanup
              image: myapp:v2.0
          restartPolicy: Never
